title: Neon Genesis Evangelion EpisodeX 25 minute OVA
display_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion EpisodeX 25 minute OVA
wikitext:
[]: Neon Genesis Evangelion Episode:X - 25 minute "OVA"             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Wed May 19, 2021 1:09 am This is what I believe to be the "true route" of the Eva 1st Impression DVD game. The base video has been upscaled to 1080p and the whole video has been subtitled in English. All elements of this video belong to khara inc.

[]: Re: Neon Genesis Evangelion Episode:X - 25 minute "OVA"             Quote Post by Kendrix » Wed May 19, 2021 7:53 am ooh what a gem! I'd been familiar with the material, but it's good to have a proper translation, I can only able out so much from what I've picked up between duolingo and subtitled anime ...diplomatically speaking, it was a wise choice to upload the Misato ending.XDD I've already seen the Rei ending, it was pretty sweet and subtle. It does irk me that the makers of the game don't seem to have gotten the memo about which characters are actually on first-name basis I kinda feel that it's a teesy bit of a waste that the game didn't have a more serious tone cause I feel there's a lot you could do with that basic concept. I think it was missing something like, - Misato & Ritsuko discussing how different he acts without the baggage - a big pep talk where Misato tells him how he beat Shamshel without training - Shinji (still amnesiac) asks where his parents are - Or, alternatively, "Hey Rei-san, was that big boss looking guy with the sunglasses your father?" * awkward silence *
